parsed.thesis: Maintain full positions. The portfolio's vol-targeted trend strategy has validated backtested Sharpe performance. Despite recent weakness in energy (-26% in 21d), uptrend signals in BRENT, WTI, and SILVER persist with 5-day reversals suggesting stabilization. Core equity longs (SPX +12.05% 63d, DAX +6.01%) provide momentum. USDJPY's dominant 0.259 position anchors with consistent uptrend. Short UST duration positions benefit from downtrend alignment. Mixed trend phases (warmup in SPX/DAX, uptrend in USDJPY/commodities) reflect normal portfolio diversification. Lag in energy is expected in trend-following; reversals indicate potential mean-reversion support. Volatility regime remains moderate and supportive of strategy validity.
